zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechtild von Virneburg於大約1287年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格時，她的父親Ruprecht II. von Virneburg33歲，母親Cunigunde van Cuijk31歲。她於1308年8月1日與Otto Graf Von Kleve在可列福結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年4月25日享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechtild von Virneburg于大约1287年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥延-可布倫維爾包格时，她的父亲Ruprecht II. von Virneburg33岁，母亲Cunigunde van Cuijk31岁。她于1308年8月1日与Otto Graf Von Kleve在可列福结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年4月25日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mechtild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechtild von Virneburg was born about 1287, in Virneburg, Mayen-Koblenz, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Ruprecht II. von Virneburg, was 33 and her mother, Cunigunde van Cuijk, was 31. She married Otto Graf Von Kleve on 1 August 1308, in Cleves. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 25 April 1360, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechtild von Virneburg est née environ 1287, à Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Ruprecht II. von Virneburg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Cunigunde van Cuijk, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Otto Graf Von Kleve le 1 août 1308, à Kleve. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1360, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechtild von Virneburg um 1287 in Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ruprecht II. von Virneburg 33 und ihre Mutter Cunigunde van Cuijk 31. Sie hat am 1. August 1308 in Kleve Otto Graf Von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. April 1360 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mechtild von Virneburg è nata il circa 1287 nel Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Ruprecht II. von Virneburg, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Cunigunde van Cuijk, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Otto Graf Von Kleve il 1 agosto 1308, nel Kleve. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1360, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Virneburgが約1287年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス メイエン-コブレンズバーネブルグで生まれた時，父Ruprecht II. von Virneburgは33歳，母Cunigunde van Cuijkは31歳であった。1308年8月1日にクレブでOtto Graf Von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年4月25日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Virneburg(이)가 대략 1287년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 메이-코블렌즈 버니버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ruprecht II. von Virneburg(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cunigunde van Cuijk(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1308년 8월 1일 클브에서 Otto Graf Von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 4월 25일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mechtild von Virneburg nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Ruprecht II. von Virneburg, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Cunigunde van Cuijk, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto Graf Von Kleve em 1 de agosto de 1308, em Kleve. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1360, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechtild von Virneburg родилась около 1287 г. в местности вирнебург, ландкрис меиен-кобленц, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Ruprecht II. von Virneburg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Cunigunde van Cuijk, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto Graf Von Kleve 1 августа 1308 г. в местности клив. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 апреля 1360 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mechtild von Virneburg nació aproximadamente 1287, en Virneburg, Landkreis Mayen-Koblenz, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Ruprecht II. von Virneburg, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Cunigunde van Cuijk, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Otto Graf Von Kleve el 1 de agosto de 1308, en Kleve. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de abril de 1360, a la edad de 74 años.
